title: alchemilla alpina var. conjuncta
intro: Alchemilla alpina var. conjuncta, also known as the Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a flowering plant species within the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla alpina var. conjuncta are numerous, and it has been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, skin problems, and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
